hotel.name: White Fort Hotel
hotel.des: {"amenities":"Take in the views from a garden and make use of amenities such as complimentary wireless internet access and concierge services.","spoken_languages":"Hindi, Arabic, English","rooms":"Make yourself at home in one of the 96 air-conditioned rooms featuring refrigerators and LED televisions. Complimentary wireless internet access keeps you connected, and cable programming is available for your entertainment. Private bathrooms with showers feature complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. Conveniences include phones, as well as safes and desks.","onsite_payments":"Visa, Diners Club, Debit cards, Discover, Cash, American Express, JCB International, Mastercard","dining":"Enjoy Chinese cuisine at White Fort, one of the hotel's 2 restaurants, or stay in and take advantage of the 24-hour room service. Buffet breakfasts are available daily from 8 AM to 10 AM for a fee.","business_amenities":"Featured amenities include a business center, express check-out, and complimentary newspapers in the lobby.","location":"With a stay at White Fort Hotel in Dubai (Deira), you'll be within a 5-minute drive of Gold Souk and City Centre Deira.  This hotel is 3.6 mi (5.8 km) from Dubai Creek and 7.4 mi (11.8 km) from Dubai Mall.","attractions":"Distances are displayed to the nearest 0.1 mile and kilometer.  Naif Souq - 0.5 km / 0.3 mi  Deira Twin Towers Shopping Centre - 0.6 km / 0.3 mi  Spice Souq - 1 km / 0.6 mi  Deira Spice Souq - 1.1 km / 0.7 mi  Fish Roundabout - 1.1 km / 0.7 mi  Gold Souk - 1.1 km / 0.7 mi  Al Ghurair Centre - 1.4 km / 0.9 mi  Burj Nahar Mall - 1.4 km / 0.9 mi  Hindi Lane - 1.6 km / 1 mi  Dubai Museum - 1.8 km / 1.1 mi  Textile Souq - 2 km / 1.2 mi  Grand Mosque - 2 km / 1.3 mi  Sheikh Saeed Al Maktoum House - 2.1 km / 1.3 mi  The Dubai Heritage Village - 2.2 km / 1.3 mi  Meena Bazaar - 2.3 km / 1.4 mi  The nearest airports are:Dubai Intl. Airport (DXB) - 6.5 km / 4 mi Sharjah (SHJ-Sharjah Intl.) - 29.7 km / 18.4 mi Al Maktoum Intl. Airport (DWC) - 67.6 km / 42 mi The preferred airport for White Fort Hotel is Dubai Intl. Airport (DXB). ","headline":"Near Gold Souk"}
